data.author: Bloomberg
data.title: IMF ready to help Economies squeezed by West Asian oil shock
data.description: According to IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva, a 10% increase in energy prices lasting a year would raise inflation by 40 basis points and slow growth by up to 0.2%
data.content:
The International Monetary Fund said it stands ready to assist countries facing balance of payment concerns amid heightened uncertainty from the West Asia conflict.

data.author: Bloomberg
data.title: Morgan Stanley turns more cautious on Asian stocks, cuts India
data.description: The strategists downgraded India from overweight to equal-weight in their latest reshuffle, citing the country as one of the Asian markets most exposed to potential Qatari LNG supply disruptions
data.content: Morgan Stanley is adopting a more cautious stance on Asian equities, trimming its India exposure on concerns that the Iran war may disrupt supply chains if oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz fail… [+1479 chars]

data.author: Bloomberg
data.title: Gold set for weekly loss as Dollar strength offsets war premium
data.description: Bullion rose as much as 1.2% to break above $5,100 an ounce, though was headed for a weekly loss of nearly 3%
data.content:
Gold recaptured some losses but remained on track for the first weekly decline in more than a month, pressured by a stronger US dollar and inflationary risks tied to the ongoing war in West Asia.

data.title: Iran barrage sweeps West Asia as Trump weighs in on succession
